sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Acquittal in Pasadena Murder That Marked ShotSpotter’s First Fatal Detection
feed.summary: A Los Angeles jury has acquitted Avery Lavon Bennett of murder charges in the 2022 shooting death of Eric Lynn Thomas, the first fatal detection by Pasadena's ShotSpotter system. Bennett subsequently pleaded no contest to a weapons charge, was sentenced to time served, and released. The prosecution's case relied on circumstantial evidence, which the defense successfully challenged.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works sets April 30 webcast for first-quarter results
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) will release its first quarter 2026 results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CDT, followed by an earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CDT. Investors can access the webcast or conference call, with replay and presentation materials available online. The announcement includes previous financial performance, guidance for 2026, and details on how to join the upcoming call.

feed.title: F5 Inc stock (US3156161024): Is its multi-cloud security edge strong enough for U.S. investor upside
feed.summary: F5 Inc. is positioned to benefit from the growing demand for cybersecurity solutions in multi-cloud environments, especially given the escalating cyber threats in U.S. enterprises. The company specializes in application security and delivery, offering a full-stack security suite that addresses modern threats at the application layer. Analysts view F5 positively because of its recurring revenue growth potential and its leadership in app security, despite acknowledging execution risks in its software transition.

feed.title: How Adobe is Involved in SJSU Careers | SJSU NewsCenter | SJSU
feed.summary: San José State University (SJSU) has partnered with Adobe to enhance career opportunities and digital literacy for its students and faculty. This collaboration has led to the creation of the Elevate Career Hub, which offers workshops, resources, and support in digital storytelling and professional software skills. The initiative aims to equip Spartans with essential tools and knowledge to succeed in the modern job market.

feed.title: NiSource Inc. stock (US65473P1057): Is its regulated utility model resilient enough for U.S. energy shifts?
feed.summary: NiSource Inc., a major regulated utility in the U.S. Midwest, operates natural gas distribution and electric transmission networks, serving millions of customers. The company's regulated business model offers predictable cash flows and stability for investors, making it a defensive holding amid market volatility. NiSource's strategic focus on infrastructure modernization, cleaner energy and leveraging rising electricity demand from data centers and EVs positions it for continued growth and aligns with national energy reliability and infrastructure development.

feed.title: Amazon.com Inc. stock (US0231351067): Is AWS growth strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: This article examines whether Amazon's AWS growth can drive new gains for investors amidst evolving market conditions. It highlights Amazon's dual business model of e-commerce and high-margin cloud computing, positioning it as a resilient tech play. The piece also discusses Amazon's competitive advantages, industry drivers, analyst views, and potential risks, offering U.S. investors insights into the stock's potential and challenges.

feed.title: [144] AUTOZONE INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Form 144 filing by AutoZone Inc. (AZO) on April 10, 2026, disclosing a proposed sale of 50 shares of common stock by an individual, acquired through restricted stock vesting as compensation. The filing indicates a "Neutral" impact and sentiment and provides details about the securities to be sold and information about the filer.

feed.title: SS&C to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 23, 2026, after market close. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The news release and webcast details will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: SS&C to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, April 23, 2026. This will be followed by an earnings conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. SS&C is a global provider of financial services and healthcare software and services.

feed.title: [Form 4] VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Joseph J. Russo, EVP & President of Global Networks & Technology for Verizon Communications, received a grant of 80.976 phantom stock units valued at $13.63 per unit. These units, which are economically tied to Verizon common stock but settled in cash, were awarded under a deferred compensation plan. This transaction increases Russo's total phantom stock holdings to 81,612.535 units, including those acquired through dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: SS&C to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Thursday, April 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Investors can access the news release, webcast, and replay through SS&C's investor relations website.

feed.title: Verizon (NYSE: VZ) EVP Kyle Malady granted new phantom stock units
feed.summary: Verizon EVP Kyle Malady was granted 127.53 unitized phantom stock units at an indicated value of $13.63 each through a deferred compensation plan. This transaction, which is a routine compensation award, increased his indirect phantom stock holdings to 410,769.153 units. These phantom units are tied to Verizon's common stock but are settled in cash and are not open-market stock purchases.

feed.title: Bristol-Myers Squibb Poised for In-Line Q1 Amid One-Off Volatility, RBC Says
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets expects Bristol-Myers Squibb to report in-line first-quarter results despite some one-off revenue and earnings volatility. The firm forecasts modest upside potential from cancer drug Revlimid and multiple myeloma treatment Abecma, but also anticipates a negative impact from lower COVID-19 antibody sales. RBC reiterated its Outperform rating and $83 price target for the stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Verizon Communications executive Samantha Hammock received a grant of 72.511 unitized phantom stock units under a deferred compensation plan, with each unit valued at $13.63. These units are settled in cash and represent an economic equivalent of a portion of common stock. After this transaction, her total phantom stock balance in the plan is 35,329.157 units, held indirectly and including dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Verizon (NYSE: VZ) director receives cash-settled phantom stock grant
feed.summary: Verizon's director and CEO, Daniel H. Schulman, was granted 195.245 cash-settled phantom stock units through a deferred compensation plan, valued at $13.63 per unit. This award increases his indirect holdings in the plan to 6,979.007 units, which include amounts accumulated from dividend reinvestment. These phantom units are economically tied to Verizon common stock but are settled in cash upon specific events.

feed.title: Progressive Corp Stock (PGR) Moved Down by 3.04% on Apr 10: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Progressive Corp (PGR) saw its stock decline by 3.04% on April 10, influenced by recent analyst price target reductions and concerns over its financial outlook. Analysts cited increased competition, inflationary pressures, and potentially optimistic auto premium estimates. Investor focus is on the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report and rising underwriting costs, which contributed to the downward movement.

feed.title: Ameriprise advisor channels to consolidate under one leader as veteran exec retires
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial is consolidating oversight of its employee and independent contractor advisor businesses under a single executive, Bill Williams, following the retirement of veteran Pat O'Connell. Williams, who has led the independent contractor channel since 2008, will now oversee both primary advisor units, the financial institutions group, and advisor recruiting. This strategic reorganization occurs during a period of strong performance in Ameriprise's wealth management arm.

feed.title: Ulta Spring Haul Sale: MAC, Rare Beauty and More for up to 40% Off
feed.summary: Ulta's Spring Haul event offers significant discounts of up to 40% off on popular beauty brands like MAC, Rare Beauty, and La Roche-Posay. The sale, which runs until April 18th, includes deals on makeup, skincare, and haircare products, as well as buy one, get one 50% off specials. The article highlights several top picks across various categories, emphasizing editor-loved items and trending products.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Stock Is Getting Thrashed. Why It’s a Bad Day for Credit Bureaus.
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) stock experienced a significant plunge on Friday, positioning it as one of the S&P 500's worst performers. This decline put the company, which provides the widely used FICO score, on track for its lowest closing price since late 2023. The article suggests it was a challenging day for credit bureaus in general.

feed.title: Gartner Faces Investor Lawsuit Over Alleged Misstatements on Contract Value Growth and Consulting Revenue
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) is facing a federal securities lawsuit alleging that the company and its executives made misleading statements regarding contract value growth rates and consulting segment revenues. The lawsuit, filed on March 17, 2026, covers investors who purchased Gartner stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The complaint claims that Gartner's statements about accelerating growth and achieving double-digit gains were overly optimistic, leading to significant stock drops after corrective disclosures in August 2025 and February 2026.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Reminds SMR Investors of the Pending Class
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding investors of NuScale Power Corporation (NYSE: SMR) Class A shares about a pending class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that NuScale misled investors regarding its business prospects, specifically concerning its partnership with ENTRA1 Energy LLC, which reportedly lacked relevant experience. Shareholders who bought shares between May 13, 2025, and November 6, 2025, are affected, and the lead plaintiff deadline to submit papers is April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Why Simply Good Foods Stock Just Had Its Worst Day in Years
feed.summary: Simply Good Foods (SMPL) stock plunged over 18% after missing revenue estimates and lowering full-year guidance. The company faces increased competition for its Quest brand and struggles with its Atkins brand due to the rise of GLP-1 weight loss drugs, coupled with macroeconomic pressures like rising cocoa prices. While the stock may appear cheap, ongoing challenges suggest it is a better short-term trade than a long-term investment.

feed.title: FedEx and pilots' union announce tentative agreement as federal mediation ends
feed.summary: FedEx and its pilots' union have reached a tentative contract agreement after five years of negotiations and federal mediation. The agreement includes a nearly 40% increase in pilots' hourly wages in 2026, followed by 3% annual raises from 2028 through 2030. This development comes after previous challenges to leadership and picketing by union members.

feed.title: Coca-Cola releasing cans with a California-inspired emblem: See it here
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is launching a limited-edition series of 52 mini cans to celebrate America's upcoming 250th birthday, featuring emblems inspired by each state, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico. The cans will highlight iconic local symbols, such as a surfer for California and a block of cheese for Wisconsin. Consumers also have the chance to win prizes, including a new Jeep or collectible pins, through a sweepstakes associated with the America250 partnership.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Inc stock (US98389B1008): Is its clean energy push strong enough for U.S. investor upside?
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is positioned as a defensive investment in the U.S. utilities sector due to its regulated business model and aggressive push into clean energy. The company aims for 80% carbon-free electricity by 2030 and 100% by 2050, aligning with federal incentives and ESG mandates. Its strategic investments in renewables and grid upgrades, coupled with a focus on high-growth regions, are expected to drive consistent earnings and dividends for U.S. investors.

feed.title: Dover Corp. stock (US25985P1030): Is its diversified industrial model strong enough for steady U.S. investor returns?
feed.summary: Dover Corp. offers U.S. investors exposure to a diversified industrial company with a strong presence in essential equipment for manufacturing, food processing, and energy infrastructure. Its diversified business model, spanning Engineered Products, Clean Energy & Fueling Solutions, Imaging & Identification, and Pumps & Process Solutions, aims to provide stability and consistent cash flows. The company's focus on niche leadership, operational efficiency, and alignment with U.S. industrial growth trends makes it an attractive defensive play for American portfolios, despite potential risks from inflation and cyclical exposure.

feed.title: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) Price Target Raised to $83.00 at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has increased its price target for Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) to $83.00 from $81.00, maintaining a "buy" rating and implying a 14% upside. Several other firms have also raised their targets, leading to a consensus of "Moderate Buy" and an average target price of $77.47. Despite a recent EPS miss, the company has set FY 2026 guidance at $2.20–$2.38 EPS, with strong institutional ownership and some insider selling observed.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Boosts Southern Copper (NYSE:SCCO) Price Target to $127.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Southern Copper (NYSE:SCCO) to $127.00 from $117.50, though it maintains an "underweight" rating, implying a potential 33.9% downside from the previous close. The analyst consensus for Southern Copper is generally bearish, with an average "Reduce" rating and an average target price of $145.19. Despite the bearish sentiment from some analysts, Southern Copper reported quarterly EPS of $1.55, which exceeded analyst estimates, and its shares were trading up by approximately 2.2% at $192.13.

feed.title: Crown Castle Inc. stock (US22822V1017): Is tower leasing demand strong enough to drive steady return
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT) in the U.S., focusing on cellular towers and fiber networks. The company benefits from stable, long-term leasing demand driven by 5G expansion, AI data center growth, and increasing mobile data usage. Despite potential risks like interest rate sensitivity and carrier consolidation, Crown Castle offers a defensive investment opportunity with predictable revenue streams and high dividend payouts, appealing to income-focused investors seeking diversification from volatile tech stocks.

feed.title: SIMPLY GOOD FOODS ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C., a stockholder rights law firm, is investigating potential claims against The Simply Good Foods Company (NASDAQ:SMPL) on behalf of its stockholders. This investigation follows Simply Good Foods' recent financial report, which indicated declining net sales, reduced full-year guidance, and a significant non-cash impairment charge. The announcement led to an 18.1% drop in the company's share price.

feed.title: Garmin Ltd. (NASDAQ: GRMN) proposes $4.20 dividend; reports record 2025 results
feed.summary: Garmin Ltd. (NASDAQ: GRMN) has proposed a $4.20 per share cash dividend, payable in four equal installments, relying on a $900,442,000 Dividend Reserve. This proposal comes alongside the disclosure of record financial results for 2025, including $7.25 billion in consolidated revenue and $1.88 billion in operating income, with over 20 million units shipped. Shareholders will vote on this and other key matters, such as director re-elections and executive compensation limits, at the 2026 Annual General Meeting on June 5, 2026.

feed.title: Roper Technologies stock (US7766961061): Is its software-led strategy strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Roper Technologies leverages a software-led strategy intertwined with niche engineered products, displaying a resilient business model focused on consistent growth through strategic acquisitions. The company's emphasis on high-margin SaaS businesses serving essential industries, coupled with a disciplined M&A approach, positions it favorably for U.S. investors seeking stable growth amidst market premiums. Despite potential risks like acquisition integration challenges and valuation concerns, analysts generally view Roper positively for its strong free cash flow conversion and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: Why Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Is Up 5.4% After Luna Launch And Board Overhaul – And What's Next
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings recently christened its new ship, Norwegian Luna, and announced year-long Caribbean sailings. Concurrently, the company is revamping its board with five new independent directors, including former British Airways CEO Alex Cruz as Lead Independent Director. These developments, particularly the enhanced guest experiences and focus on operational efficiency and governance, are seen as supporting Norwegian's premium strategy amidst challenges like high leverage and volatile fuel costs.

feed.title: Ares Targets $20 Billion For New Private Credit Fund
feed.summary: Ares Management (NYSE: ARES) plans to launch a new flagship U.S. direct lending fund aiming to raise approximately $20 billion, with a summer launch expected. This initiative comes despite a broader slowdown in the private credit market, as other asset managers like Blackstone and Goldman Sachs are also active, demonstrating resilient investor demand. The move highlights continued interest in private credit amid market dislocations, even as some firms face increasing investor withdrawal requests.

feed.title: Does Record Recurring Revenue And Document Crunch Deal Reshape The Bull Case For Trimble (TRMB)?
feed.summary: Trimble recently reported strong 2025 results, including 6% organic revenue growth and record annualized recurring revenue, alongside a strategic acquisition of Document Crunch. These developments reinforce Trimble's shift towards higher-margin, recurring software and services, which is central to its investment appeal. The article suggests this focus on recurring revenue and workflow software acquisitions like Document Crunch will be key to its long-term value creation, though it acknowledges the risk of slower adoption of subscription models in hardware-heavy segments.

feed.title: Today's Analyst Rating for Silgan Holdings (SLGN): Maintains and Lowers Price Target | SLGN Stock News
feed.summary: UBS has maintained a Neutral rating for Silgan Holdings (SLGN) but lowered its price target from $50.00 to $46.00, an 8% decrease. This adjustment reflects ongoing analyst assessments of the company's market position and performance. Despite the recent price target reduction, the average one-year target price from 12 analysts is $54.77, suggesting a potential upside of 31.14% from its current price.

feed.title: Salesforce Inc. stock (US78409V1044): Is AI innovation strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Salesforce Inc.'s (US78409V1044) position in the cloud computing and AI sector, highlighting its AI-driven strategy and expansion into autonomous agents with Agentforce. It discusses the company's core SaaS business model, competitive advantages against rivals like Microsoft and Oracle, and key risks including macroeconomic slowdowns and regulatory scrutiny. The article concludes by emphasizing Salesforce's strong analyst sentiment and the importance of AI monetization for future performance.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Increases Firan Technology Group (TSE:FTG) Price Target to C$24.00
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has increased its price target for Firan Technology Group (TSE:FTG) from C$20.00 to C$24.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating, which suggests a potential upside of nearly 27%. This adjustment comes after the company reported quarterly EPS of C$0.14 on C$47.3 million in revenue. Firan Technology Group, a supplier of aerospace and defense electronic products, saw its shares drop 4.2% to C$18.90 on Friday following the earnings release.

feed.title: Eversource Energy stock (US30040W1080): Is its regulated utility model resilient enough for U.S. ene
feed.summary: Eversource Energy leverages its regulated utility model to provide stable returns and reliable dividends for investors, operating across Connecticut, Massachusetts, and New Hampshire. The company focuses on essential services like electricity, natural gas, and water, with significant investments in grid modernization and renewable energy projects. Despite potential regulatory hurdles and high capital intensity, Eversource is seen as a defensive investment aligned with U.S. economic stability and energy shifts.

feed.title: PulteGroup Inc. stock (US7458671010): Is housing demand strong enough to drive fresh upside now?
feed.summary: PulteGroup Inc., a major U.S. homebuilder, focuses on move-up buyers in fast-growing Sun Belt states, positioning it well in a market with high rates and inventory shortages. The article highlights PulteGroup's integrated business model, strong market position, and potential for growth driven by demographic tailwinds and strategic initiatives like appealing to various market segments. Investors should monitor housing starts, interest rate trends, and the company's financial health, while being aware of risks like affordability challenges and construction costs.

feed.title: Sasol (NYSE:SSL) Shares Up 5.8% - What's Next?
feed.summary: Sasol (NYSE:SSL) shares rose 5.8% during midday trading on Friday, though trading volume was significantly below average. Analyst sentiment remains largely cautious, with a "Reduce" consensus rating, despite a recent upgrade from Wall Street Zen. The company has moderate liquidity and leverage, but institutional ownership is low, even with some recent inflows.

feed.title: Apartment building by Huntington Metro sells for $151M. Same buyer also paid $260M for a Chantilly property.
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has acquired the Aspire Huntington Station apartment complex near the Huntington Metro for $150.5 million. This 366-unit property, previously known as Aventon Huntington Station, offers amenities such as a smart package room and a pet spa. The same buyer also recently purchased an apartment property in Chantilly for $258.5 million.

feed.title: Republic Services opens upgraded recycling center in Massachusetts
feed.summary: Republic Services has opened its upgraded Peabody Recycling Center in Massachusetts, featuring new Machinex technology that increases processing capacity from 20 to 35-40 tons per hour. The facility now includes automated sorting, AI-powered technology, and enhanced safety systems like a Fire Rover. These improvements aim to boost sorting precision, divert more waste from landfills, and deliver cleaner commodities, supporting Massachusetts's waste reduction goals and the greater Boston community.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $5,601,000 Capped Accelerated Barrier Notes, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are linked to the performance of the Dow Jones Industrial Average, Nasdaq-100 Index, and Russell 2000 Index, with a maximum return of 76.00% at maturity and a potential loss of principal if any underlying index falls below its barrier amount. The notes priced on April 8, 2026, and are designed for investors seeking amplified returns on index appreciation but willing to forgo interest and dividends, and accept credit risk associated with JPMorgan Financial and its guarantor, JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: Ameren Corp. stock (US0236081024): Is regulated utility stability strong enough for upside now?
feed.summary: Ameren Corp. (US0236081024) is a regulated utility providing electricity and natural gas in the Midwest, offering defensive exposure for investors through predictable cash flows and dividend stability. The company's focus on clean energy transition and rate base expansion aligns with U.S. infrastructure trends and federal incentives, positioning it for steady growth despite risks like rising interest rates and regulatory decisions. Analysts generally view Ameren favorably for its stability and growth prospects within the utility sector.

feed.title: Wall Street Sees 43% Upside in Uber (UBER) Despite Recent Growth-Stock Selloff
feed.summary: Uber (UBER) is trading significantly below its analyst consensus target of $103.58, implying a 43% upside, despite a recent growth-stock selloff and a Q4 2025 EPS miss due to a non-cash revaluation charge. The company demonstrated strong operational performance with a 65% increase in free cash flow and 22% trip growth. Analysts remain bullish, citing opportunities in autonomous vehicle monetization and conservative guidance, suggesting strong underlying fundamentals despite market volatility.

feed.title: Sonoco Products (NYSE:SON) Price Target Lowered to $59.00 at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Sonoco Products (NYSE:SON) from $62.00 to $59.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This implies a potential upside of approximately 3.8% from the current stock price. Despite varied analyst opinions resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating, Sonoco recently surpassed its quarterly EPS estimates and saw a 29.7% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: SNOW Deadline: Rosen Law Firm Urges Snowflake Inc. (NYSE: SNOW) Stockholders with Losses in Excess of $100K to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors who purchased Snowflake Inc. (NYSE: SNOW) Class A common stock between June 27, 2023, and February 28, 2024, about a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Snowflake made misleading statements about its business operations, specifically regarding consumption and revenues. Shareholders with losses over $100,000 are urged to contact the firm, with a lead plaintiff motion deadline of April 27, 2026.

feed.title: Why Simply Good Foods (SMPL) Stock Is Nosediving
feed.summary: Simply Good Foods (SMPL) stock plunged by 10.9% after the company reported weak fiscal second-quarter financial results, missing analysts' estimates, and subsequently lowered its full-year sales and earnings outlook. The company also disclosed a significant $249 million impairment charge, reflecting a challenging fiscal year and revised future revenue projections. This downturn comes despite a previous upgrade by Jefferies, highlighting the current negative market sentiment outweighing past growth drivers like the Quest nutrition bar brand.

feed.title: UBS Group Has Lowered Expectations for Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) Stock Price
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) from $235 to $225, while maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating a potential 9% upside. Despite this, the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $231.86. The company recently missed quarterly EPS estimates and provided Q1 2026 guidance around $2.20 EPS.
